title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited:
NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
